title: New Recipes
description: adding new recipes that every minecraft player needs
body:
# Did you ever missed a recipe? Here it is! ### Craft all the things you want.
✅ adding recipes for elytras, totems, enchanted golden apples, leather and many more
✅ light-weight
✅ doesn't need a library mod **_We currently are taking a break in the development of this mod. Support will continue to be available._**
